projectDescription: A Discord bot that automatically fixes social media embeds from 30+ platforms using online services.
keyFeatures: Supports 30+ social media platforms including Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, Reddit, Threads, Bluesky, Snapchat, and more
Automatic embed fixing with configurable behavior (remove embeds, delete message, or do nothing)
Advanced filtering by channel, role, member, or keyword with allow/deny lists
Custom website support for extending platform coverage
Multiple embed view modes (normal, direct media, gallery, text-only) per platform
Multi-language support (English, French, Polish, Russian, Spanish, Vietnamese, Chinese, Portuguese, Japanese)
publicApiSurface: /settings - Configure bot behavior for your server
/about - Get information about the bot and help
Environment Variables: DISCORD_TOKEN, DEV_GUILD, DATABASE_HOST, DATABASE_PORT, DATABASE_NAME, DATABASE_USER, DATABASE_PASSWORD, DATABASE_DRIVER
Configuration: override.config.yml for customizing bot settings
Website Classes: WebsiteLink base class for implementing custom website support
Database Models: Guild, TextChannel, Member, Role, CustomWebsite, Event
Guild Settings: original_message, reply_to_message, reply_silently, webhooks, keywords, twitter_view, instagram_view, tiktok_view, bluesky_view
Filter Settings: channels, members, roles (with allow/deny lists)
Keyword Filtering: Allow/deny list with regex matching
